title: Per-Game Asset Bundles
deviation_notes: Refs resolve against a code-side SPEC_REGISTRY keyed by spec id (with a kind match and a declared-id consistency check) instead of path-based references; new checked-in specs register there. Ref schema gained an optional atlas override for timeline packing; sheets always pack at cols 4 / 32x32. Export roots at <outDir>/<game>/ so repeated exports into one parent stay isolated.
